title: <div>Can you recommend any reading material or viewing material that would help
content:
Can you recommend any reading material or viewing material that would help me improve this draft on its next revision?

Write everything that happens before the story starts. A story is like an iceberg: what an audience receives is only the tip, the rest (aka also known as the other 90%) is all the subconscious stuff that makes the story feel real to the audience, and that work needs to still be done by the author to make the word feel lived in.
